error_signature: The item has no binary field '[object Object]' [item 0]
title: HTTP Request node missing binary field
symptom: The HTTP Request node fails with an error indicating that the item has no binary field. This occurs when trying to send a file in the request body.
applies_when: Sending a file as binary data
not_this_if: Binary data is correctly set in the node
The request is not using multipart/form-data
root_cause: The error occurs because the HTTP Request node is not correctly configured to reference the binary data field. The input data field name must match the field where the binary data is stored, and if it is incorrectly set, the node cannot find the binary data to send.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node before the HTTP Request node and set it to Combine mode.
In the HTTP Request node, set the 'Input Data Field Name' to 'data'.
Save the workflow and test it again.
agent_instruction: Use a Merge node to combine data and set the input field name in the HTTP Request node to 'data'.
